sentences.target: On danse sur la piste ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ dɑ̃s syʁ la pist sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: On danse sur la piste ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ dɑ̃s syʁ la pist sə swaʁ/
translations.en: We’re dancing on the dance floor tonight.
translations.es: Bailamos en la pista esta noche.
translations.de: Wir tanzen heute Abend auf der Tanzfläche.
translations.zh-Hans: 今晚我们在舞池里跳舞。
translations.ru: Сегодня вечером мы танцуем на танцполе.
translations.pt: Vamos dançar na pista hoje à noite.
translations.he: אנחנו רוקדים על רחבת הריקודים הערב.
translations.tr: Bu akşam dans pistinde dans ediyoruz.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng tôi nhảy trên sàn nhảy.
translations.nl: Vanavond dansen we op de dansvloer.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ввечері ми танцюємо на танцполі.
translations.hi: आज रात हम डांस फ्लोर पर नाच रहे हैं.
translations.nb: I kveld danser vi på dansegulvet.
translations.id: Malam ini kami berdansa di lantai dansa.
translations.sv: I kväll dansar vi på dansgolvet.
translations.ro: Diseară dansăm pe ringul de dans.
translations.cs: Dnes večer tančíme na tanečním parketu.
translations.da: I aften danser vi på dansegulvet.
translations.ja: 今夜はダンスフロアで踊ります。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun, grammatically 3rd person singular, commonly used in spoken French with the meaning ‘we’; subject of the verb.
Main verb in the present indicative, 3rd person singular, agreeing with ‘On’; expresses the action of dancing.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing the noun ‘piste’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘sur’; here denotes a dance floor.
Demonstrative determiner modifying ‘soir’; forms the temporal expression ‘ce soir’ (tonight/this evening).
Common noun used as a temporal complement with ‘ce’.

translations.vi: Hôm nay hãy đi làn đường dành cho xe đạp.
translations.hi: आज साइकिल लेन का इस्तेमाल करो.
translations.ja: 今日は自転車レーンを使ってください。

tokens.explanation: Imperative mood, 2nd person singular; directs the addressee to perform the action.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing ‘piste’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘Prends’; here refers to a lane/track.
Adjective meaning suitable for cycling; post-nominal modifier of ‘piste’, forming ‘piste cyclable’ (bike lane).
Temporal adverb indicating the time of the action; orthographic apostrophe is part of the word.

sentences.target: J’ai une piste pour ton cadeau.

translations.fr: J’ai une piste pour ton cadeau.
translations.en: I’ve got a lead for your present.
translations.es: Tengo una pista para tu regalo.
translations.de: Ich habe einen Hinweis zu deinem Geschenk.
translations.it: Ho una dritta per il tuo regalo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我有关于你的礼物的线索。
translations.yue: 我有啲關於你份禮物嘅線索。
translations.ru: У меня есть наводка по поводу твоего подарка.
translations.pt: Tenho uma dica para o seu presente.
translations.he: יש לי קצה חוט לגבי המתנה שלך.
translations.vi: Tôi có manh mối về món quà của bạn.
translations.nl: Ik heb een tip voor je cadeau.
translations.uk: У мене є зачіпка щодо твого подарунка.
translations.hu: Van egy nyomom az ajándékoddal kapcsolatban.
translations.hi: तुम्हारे तोहफ़े के लिए मेरे पास एक सुराग है.
translations.pl: Mam trop w sprawie twojego prezentu.
translations.el: Έχω ένα στοιχείο για το δώρο σου.
translations.nb: Jeg har et tips om gaven din.
translations.id: Aku punya petunjuk untuk kado kamu.
translations.sv: Jag har en ledtråd angående din present.
translations.ro: Am un indiciu pentru cadoul tău.
translations.da: Jeg har et tip til din gave.
translations.ja: あなたのプレゼントの手がかりがあります。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject clitic with elision before a vowel-initial verb form.
Present indicative, 1st person singular; lexical verb meaning ‘to have’ (not auxiliary here).
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing ‘piste’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘ai’; here means a lead/clue.
Preposition introducing a purpose/beneficiary complement.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, masculine singular; modifies ‘cadeau’.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of the preposition ‘pour’.

sentences.target: Ils suivent la piste dans la forêt.
sentences.reading: /il sɥiv la pist dɑ̃ la fɔʁɛ/

translations.fr: Ils suivent la piste dans la forêt.
translations.ipa: /il sɥiv la pist dɑ̃ la fɔʁɛ/
translations.en: They’re following the trail in the forest.
translations.es: Siguen el sendero en el bosque.
translations.de: Sie folgen dem Pfad im Wald.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们在森林里沿着小路前行。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺森林入面沿住條小路行。
translations.ru: Они идут по тропе в лесу.
translations.pt: Eles seguem a trilha na floresta.
translations.vi: Họ đang theo con đường mòn trong rừng.
translations.nl: Ze volgen het pad in het bos.
translations.hi: वे जंगल में पगडंडी का पीछा कर रहे हैं.
translations.id: Mereka mengikuti jalur setapak di hutan.
translations.ja: 彼らは森の中の小道をたどっています。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person masculine plural subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 3rd person plural; main verb of the clause.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing ‘piste’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘suivent’; here denotes a physical path/trail.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing ‘forêt’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘dans’ indicating location.
